member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.CollectionService.GetNextDefaultName(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification},Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType)
member.summary: Gets the next default name for the given template type.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.CollectionService.IsNameValid(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification},System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Checks of the newName is already used.
member.param: The candidate name.
Error message, false is returned
member.returns: True if the name is still available, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.CollectionService.GetToast(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification},System.String)
member.summary: Get a toast by name. Return null if the name is not valid.

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastOnActivatedEventArgs
member.summary: Arguments coming from interacting with a toast notification.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastOnActivatedEventArgs.Arguments
member.summary: Gets the arguments from the element that the user has interacted with.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastOnActivatedEventArgs.UserInput
member.summary: Gets the user input from elements like textboxes/comboboxes.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastAttribute.Values
member.summary: Empty array - textbox input. Non-empty array - dropdown input.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastAttribute.SelectedValue
member.summary: The value that the user has filled in/selected.

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationBuilder
member.summary: A class that builds different toast notifications, based on a given template.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationBuilder.AddElement(System.String,Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastElement,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Adds an element to the given XML.
member.param: The XML that will be updated.
The element to add.
The modified XML.
Error message, if went horse into the river.
member.returns: True if successful, false if went horse into the river.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationBuilder.CreateToast(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Set and for parameter bindings to work.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationBuilder.CreateScheduledToast(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Set for scheduled toasts. And is needed to remove a scheduled toast.

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationManagerImpl
member.summary: A manager class that registers an application, so it can raise toast and receive toast activations. The manager is also responsible for showing the toasts. Do not forget to unregister in the end.

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastOnActivatedEventHandler
member.summary: Event handler for toast activation.

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastElementManager
member.summary: Description of the different elements and attributes that a toast XML can contain.

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection
member.summary: A collection of RadToastNotification. Supports unique names. Can access a RadToastNotification through its name. Names must be unique.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copy constructor that supports shallow and deep copy.
member.param: A list of toast notifications to copy.
True to use deep copy, false to use shallow copy. Deep copy is default.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets or sets the toast notification at the specified index. Throws if the name is not unique.
member.param: The zero-based index of the toast notification to get or set.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.Item(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a toast based on its name. Return null if the name does not exist in the collection.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.Add(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Adds a RadToastNotification to the end of the collection, if the name is unique. Throws if the name is not unique.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.AddRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification})
member.summary: Adds the RadToastNotifications of the given collection to the end of the RadToastNotificationCollection. Throws if one of the names is not unique.
member.param: The given collection

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.Clear
member.summary: Clears all RadToastNotifications from the collection.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.Insert(System.Int32,Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Inserts a RadToastNotification into the collection at the specified index. Throws if the name is not unique.
member.param: The given index

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.InsertRange(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification})
member.summary: Adds the RadToastNotifications of the given collection at the specified index. Throws if one of the names is not unique.
member.param: The given index
The given collection

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.Remove(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Removes a given RadToastNotification from the collection.
member.returns: True if RadToastNotification is successfully removed; otherwise, false. This method also returns false if RadToastNotification was not found in the collection.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.RemoveAt(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a RadToastNotification at the given index.
member.param: The given index

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.RemoveRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a range of RadToastNotifications from the collection.
member.param: The zero-based starting index of the range of RadToastNotifications to remove.
The number of RadToastNotifications to remove.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotificationCollection.RemoveAll(System.Predicate{Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification})
member.summary: Removes all the RadToastNotifications that match the conditions defined by the specified predicate.
member.param: The delegate that defines the conditions of the elements to remove

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType
member.summary: Enumeration with the toast templates.

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastGeneric
member.summary: Generic template used in Windows 10

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastNews
member.summary: News template

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastAlarm
member.summary: Alarm template

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastCall
member.summary: Phone Call template

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastChat
member.summary: Chat template

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastReminder
member.summary: Meeting template

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastWeather
member.summary: Weather template

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastDownload
member.summary: Download template

member.name: F:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType.ToastLegacy
member.summary: Legacy template, used in Windows 8

member.name: T:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification
member.summary: Represents a toast notification that can be displayed to the user, providing customizable content, templates, and delivery options for desktop notifications.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.TemplateType
member.summary: Gets or sets the template type that defines the layout and visual structure of the .

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.Xml
member.summary: Gets or sets the XML content that defines the structure, layout, and content of the body.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets a unique identifier name for the that can be used for identification and management within a RadToastNotificationCollection.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.DeliveryTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the scheduled delivery time for the toast notification, allowing notifications to be displayed at a specific future time.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.Tag
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique tag identifier for this notification, enabling updates or replacement of existing notifications with the same tag.

member.name: P:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.BindingData
member.summary: Gets or sets the binding data as key-value pairs for template parameter substitution, where the key represents the binding parameter name and the value contains the replacement content.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a generic template type and a randomly generated unique name identifier.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.#ctor(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class by creating a copy of an existing notification with identical properties.
member.param: The source instance to copy properties from.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.#ctor(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified template type and unique name, using the default XML template for the template type.
member.param: The that defines the notification's layout and visual structure.
The unique identifier name for the notification, which must not be null or empty.

member.name: M:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.#ctor(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastTemplateType,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified template type, unique name, and custom XML content for advanced notification customization.
member.param: The that defines the notification's layout structure.
The unique identifier name for the notification, which must not be null or empty.
The custom XML content that defines the structure and content of the notification body.

member.name: E:Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification.PropertyChanged
member.summary: Occurs when a property value changes, providing notification of property modifications for data binding and change tracking scenarios.

member.name: T:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager
member.summary: Manages toast notifications creation, display, scheduling, and dismissal for Windows desktop applications.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.manager
member.summary: The manager!

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.builder
member.summary: A builder for toasts.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.toastNotifications
member.summary: A list of the created notifications.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.shownToasts
member.summary: Stores the shown notifications.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified container.
member.param: The container to add the component to.

member.name: P:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.ToastNotifications
member.summary: Gets or sets a collection of initialized toast notifications that can be shown by the manager.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.Unregister
member.summary: Cleans up resources used by the Toast Notification Manager and removes all displayed notifications. Calling this will clear notifications in the action center as well. Call this when the program exits or during uninstallation. Must be called from the same executable that displayed the toast notifications.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.ShowNotification(System.Int32)
member.summary: Shows a notification from the collection using its index.
member.param: The zero-based index of the notification to display.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.ShowNotification(System.String)
member.summary: Shows a notification from the collection using its name.
member.param: The unique name of the notification to display.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.ShowNotification(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Shows a given toast notification immediately.
member.param: The instance that will be displayed.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.HideNotification
member.summary: Hides the most recently displayed toast notification that is currently visible.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.UpdateNotification(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Updates a displayed notification based on its unique tag with new binding data.
member.param: The unique that identifies the notification to update.
Key-value pairs that will update the notification's content. The key is the binding parameter name and the value is the new content to display.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.AddScheduledNotification(Telerik.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastNotification)
member.summary: Schedules a toast notification to be displayed at a future time specified by . To enable later removal of the scheduled notification, assign a unique which can be used with .
member.param: The that will be scheduled for future display.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.RemoveScheduledNotification(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a previously scheduled notification that has not yet been displayed. The notification is identified by the unique assigned when it was scheduled.
member.param: The unique tag that identifies the scheduled notification to remove.

member.name: E:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.RadToastOnActivated
member.summary: Occurs when a user interacts with a toast notification by clicking on it or its action buttons.

member.name: F:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Telerik.WinControls.UI.RadToastNotificationManager.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.
